message:
fix(vdbe): correct test assumptions for ResultRow register semantics

Two test fixes in VDBE:

1. test_memmax_stores_larger_value: The test assumed register r2 would
   persist across ResultRow calls, but ResultRow now uses take_reg_range
   which moves values out and clears registers to Null. Since MemMax
   compares val1 > val2 (where val2 = to_integer(Null) = 0), the second
   MemMax incorrectly stored 10 instead of preserving 50. Fix: re-initialize
   r2=50 before the second MemMax call.

2. test_codegen_select_covering_order_by_skips_table_lookup: The test
   expected covering index ORDER BY optimization but used default context
   which has index_ordered_scan_reliable=false. This flag was added in
   Fix #107 to prevent wrong results on MemDatabase. Fix: explicitly set
   index_ordered_scan_reliable=true in the test context, matching the
   pattern used by adjacent ORDER BY tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
